name: East Blue Fishing Festival
description: Villagers gather at the docks for a fishing contest and temporary shop discounts.

name: Bandit Raid on Foosha
description: Bandits descend from Mt. Colubo. Players can defend villagers and earn reputation.

name: Marine Inspection
description: Marine patrols increase around Loguetown. Pirates with bounties may be challenged.

name: Aqua Laguna
description: A massive sea surge floods Water 7, opening hidden routes and closing some shops.

name: Sea King Migration
description: Sea Kings are moving between regions. Voyages become dangerous but rare materials appear.

name: Sky Lightning Storm
description: Lightning storms rage over Upper Yard. Sky resources and Goro-related clues become easier to find.
